# title

**Instance Property**

The receiver’s original page title.

## Declaration

```swift
var title: String! { get }
```

## Discussion

The title returned comes from the title HTML tag for HTML documents.

## Getting and setting page titles

- **alternateTitle**: An alternate title that may be used in place of the receiver’s page title.

items.description: An alternate title that may be used in place of the receiver’s page title.
items.name: alternateTitle
